title: Beille Classic Bakers Solid Lotus Wood Rolling Pin Pie Crust Pizza Dough 13" 15"
description:
Classic in design, include these bakers wood rolling pin with your baking supplies for any dough recipe! With a slightly porous surface, this lotus wood rolling pin from Beille is less likely to stick, resulting in smooth and more uniform dough! The rolling pins themselves are also very lightweight, making them easy on hands, arms and shoulders, even for big batch recipes. Why wood over other materials? It’s really a matter of personal preference of course, but also depends what you plan on baking! Beille’s lightweight wood rolling pins (available in 13 or 15 inch full lengths), feature a very smooth surface which allows flour to stick well, while also allowing for some moisture to be absorbed when rolling; this also makes it more favorable when rolling out dough that is more wet

Beille Classic Bakers Solid Lotus Wood Rolling Pin Pie Crust Pizza Dough 13" 15"

Classic in design, include these bakers wood rolling pin with your baking supplies for any dough recipe! With a slightly porous surface, this lotus wood rolling pin from Beille is less likely to stick, resulting in smooth and more uniform dough! The rolling pins themselves are also very lightweight, making them easy on hands, arms and shoulders, even for big batch recipes.

Why wood over other materials? It’s really a matter of personal preference of course, but also depends what you plan on baking! Beille’s lightweight wood rolling pins (available in 13 or 15 inch full lengths), feature a very smooth surface which allows flour to stick well, while also allowing for some moisture to be absorbed when rolling; this also makes it more favorable when rolling out dough that is more wet.

Key Features

  • 13 OR 15 INCH ROLLING PIN: Classic in its design, add this wood rolling pin to your baking supplies to tackle any dough recipe; with a slightly porous surface, this lotus wood rolling pin from Beille is less likely to stick, resulting in smooth and more uniform dough
  • SMALL WOOD ROLLING PIN: Ideal for small baking tasks, like kids pizzas, dumplings, fondant, pasta and more, Beille’s mini wood rolling pin features a 6 inch barrel; the rolling pin weighs in at 0.42lbs, making it lightweight enough to work with even the most delicate of pastries, and it’s great for kids
  • CONTOURED WOOD HANDLES: Featuring durable, contoured wood handles, they provide a naturally comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough
  • ROLLING PIN CARE: Handwash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13.5 or 15.25 (L) x 2 (W) x 2 (H) inches; Weight: 13 Inch is 0.42lbs, 15 Inch is 0.50lbs; Note: 13 and 15 inch lengths denote the full rolling pin length, not the barrel length

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BEI4PCKIUS
  • UPC: 810131705503
  • Color: Brown

These wood rolling pins are great for all kinds of baking recipes, whether it be pizza dough, pie crusts, tarts, cookies and more! In particular, the mini rolling pin is an excellent option for working with smaller and more delicate dough for recipes like dumplings, fondant, tortellini, ravioli and more. The mini rolling pin is also a great option for kids who want to help or have a passion for baking!

And lastly, featuring durable, contoured wood handles, they provide a comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough; handles attach to a full length steel axle for easy and effortless rolling. When finished using the stainless steel rolling pin, hand wash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher. A great gift for any baking enthusiast or professional patissier, chef or home cook, or as a home essentials item to include with your arsenal of baking supplies.

Choose from a 13.5 inch full length wood rolling pin with 6 inch barrel OR;

Choose from a 15.25 inch full length wood rolling pin with 8.25 inch barrel
